title: 2023 Singapore reported median total compensation by headquarters location
summary: Aggregate results from Design Pay Asia 2022-23 survey data, filtered exactly to Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD (n=223). Respondents physically based at their company's headquarters reported a median of S$72,000 (n=139); respondents not at headquarters reported S$120,280 (n=66), 67.1% higher. These are respondent medians, not population estimates.
methodology: The authoritative worksheet was filtered using exact matches Country = Singapore and Currency you draw your salary in = SGD, leaving n=223. One Singapore response reported in USD was excluded and no currency conversion was applied. Headquarters location is self-reported (physically at headquarters vs not); 18 respondents did not specify and are excluded from this comparison. Both published cohorts meet the minimum n=10 threshold, and no respondent-level data is exposed.
